title: President (disambiguation)
content:
'''President''' was a title that referred to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[President]]''', a title used towards the end of the [[High Republic Era]] on [[Begamor]] as well as the [[Aakaash system]].
*'''[[Presidente]]''' of the [[Commerce Guild]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[President/Legends|'''President''']]
*[[Chief of State|'''President of the New Republic/Galactic Alliance''']]
*[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|'''President of the (Old/Galactic) Republic''']]
*'''[[President of the Senate]]'''
*[[Presidente/Legends|'''Presidente''']] of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]
*Leader of the [[Sullustan Council]]
*'''[[President of the Tiss'sharl League]]'''
*'''[[President of Ylesia]]'''
*Leader of the [[Esselian Hall]]
*Leader of [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]]
*Leader of [[Sern Prime/Legends|Sern Prime]]
*Leader of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]
*Leader of [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]]
*'''[[President of Five Worlds]]'''
*Leader of the [[People's Inquest]]

{{Interlang
|es=Presidente
}}
